---
title: Preamble injection test
---

## Explicit preamble

```{r}
#| echo: false
calepin.preamble("\\usepackage{booktabs}")
calepin.preamble("\\usepackage{longtable}")
```

## Duplicate (should appear only once)

```{r}
#| echo: false
calepin.preamble("\\usepackage{booktabs}")
```

## Via knit_meta (like tinytable does)

```{r}
#| echo: false
knitr::knit_meta_add(list(rmarkdown::latex_dependency("float")))
knitr::knit_meta_add(list(rmarkdown::latex_dependency("tabularray", extra_lines = "\\UseTblrLibrary{siunitx}")))
```

## Body content

Hello world. The preamble above should contain:

- `\usepackage{booktabs}` (once, not twice)
- `\usepackage{longtable}`
- `\usepackage{float}`
- `\usepackage{tabularray}`
- `\UseTblrLibrary{siunitx}`
